name: Whitney Cummings
blurb: She co-created the CBS sitcom 2 Broke Girls and created and starred in the NBC sitcom Whitney.
bio: Whitney Cummings is an American stand-up comedian, actress, writer, and producer known for blunt material on relationships, feminism, and dating. She co-created the CBS sitcom 2 Broke Girls and created and starred in the NBC sitcom Whitney. Her stand-up specials include Money Shot, I Love You, and the Netflix hour Can I Touch It, and she hosts the podcast Good for You.

timeline.ev: Named one of Varietys 10 Comics to Watch
Releases her first hour special, Money Shot, on Comedy Central
Co-creates 2 Broke Girls and stars in the sitcom Whitney
Releases the Netflix special Can I Touch It
Launches the Good for You podcast

accolades: Co-creator of the CBS sitcom 2 Broke Girls
Four hour-long stand-up specials across Comedy Central, HBO, and Netflix
Performer at multiple Comedy Central Roasts
